/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ClientSensor.dir/clientsensor/rootswcomponent/port/sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClientSensor.dir/clientsensor/rootswcomponent/clientsensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClientSensor.dir/main.cpp.o -o ClientSensor  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/para-sdk/lib: /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_core.so.1.0.0 /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_com.so.1.0.0 -lpthread /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_per.so.1.0.0 /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_iam.so.1.0.0 /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_exec.so.1.0.0 /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_base.so.1.0.0 /opt/para-sdk/lib/libpara_log.so.1.0.0
